description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of honey-sweetened cereal called 'Sabrokintos.' The front features a playful illustration of a Viking mascot standing in a red bowl filled with cereal rings, with honey dripping from the top edge of the box. The back displays the product description in Spanish, highlighting its energy and nutritional benefits, along with a stylized Viking ship. One side panel contains a detailed nutrition facts label, while the opposite side shows decorative knotwork and a small block of ingredients text. The box is predominantly orange and yellow, with white accents representing milk or honey splashes. The overall design is vibrant and appealing, targeting a youthful audience with its cartoonish Viking theme.
description: A vibrant orange cardboard cereal box featuring a Viking mascot, honey drips, and playful graphics, labeled 'Sabrokintos.' The packaging highlights honey-sweetened cereal with nutritional and promotional details.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'Sabrokintos' branding, a Viking mascot in a bowl of cereal, and honey drips along the top edge.
description_view_1: The left side displays decorative knotwork, honey drips, and a small ingredients label at the bottom.
description_view_2: The back features the product description in Spanish, a Viking ship illustration, and honey drips along the top.
description_view_3: The right side presents a detailed nutrition facts panel and honey drips at the top.
attribute_flavor_indication: The box features honey drips and the text 'CEREALES ENDULZADOS CON MIEL,' indicating a honey flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the right side of the box, listing calories, fat, carbohydrates, protein, and vitamins.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A cartoon Viking mascot is prominently displayed on the front, serving as a promotional character.
